[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 0110110 4
2 1011000 3
3 1110110 5
4 0010101 3
5 1101101 5
6 0000100 1
7 0011010 3

01 0000000 a
12 0001010 2
23 1100101 4
34 0010010 2
45 0001001 2
56 0000100 1 match 6
67 0000001 1
70 1101000 3

71 0000000 a
